title: Phase 0 Spike A2 — Custom Type Test
description: Throwaway module that declares a custom Actor type and a custom Item type via the manifest documentTypes field, to prove the durable v14 registration path before building the Destined port. Delete after testing.
//1: THE ACTUAL TEST. In Foundry v14 a module declares document sub-types
//2: here. Foundry reads this at load and merges them into the valid type
//3: list BEFORE document validation classes are built — which is exactly
//4: the timing the old main.bundle.js patch was faking. If a 'spikeActor'
//5: type becomes creatable in the New Actor dialog with THIS module active
//6: and NO change to the system's template.json, the manifest route is
//7: confirmed and Phase 5 (custom Destined actor types) is viable.
